category_sources: source_facts.description says it extracts .zip compressed archives; official Info-ZIP UnZip page describes UnZip as an extraction utility for zip archives.
display_name_sources: Official Info-ZIP page title is Info-ZIP's UnZip; source_facts.name is unzip.
docs_sources: Official Info-ZIP UnZip page documents release status, downloads, and technical links; official Info-ZIP FAQ covers usage and distribution questions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Info-ZIP pages point to source archives and SourceForge files, but no official source-control project URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists unzip, funzip, unzipsfx, zipgrep, and zipinfo; source_facts.description and official Info-ZIP page identify ZIP archive extraction/viewing.
